title: Aviara Classic Slim Fit Chino Pants
description: These slim fit chinos from Aviara blend comfort with a refined silhouette, perfect for office-to‑evening transitions. Crafted from a breathable cotton‑spandex blend, they hold their shape all day long. Available in versatile neutrals, they pair effortlessly with shirts and sneakers alike.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

title: Lunaelle Floral Maxi Dress
description: Lunaelle's floral maxi dress exudes bohemian elegance with its flowing silhouette and delicate print. The lightweight chiffon drapes gracefully, making it ideal for garden parties or summer weddings. A concealed side zipper ensures a smooth fit while the adjustable straps provide comfort.

title: Nordic Peak Waterproof Insulated Jacket
description: Engineered for harsh winter conditions, the Nordic Peak jacket offers waterproof protection and premium down insulation. Its articulated sleeves and adjustable hood provide mobility and warmth during outdoor adventures. A sleek black finish makes it suitable for both city commutes and mountain hikes.

title: Elysian Silk Blend Evening Gown
description: The Elysian evening gown features a luxurious silk‑blend fabric that catches the light with every movement. Its mermaid cut accentuates the waist and hips, while the subtle sequin detailing adds a touch of glamour. Perfect for red‑carpet events or upscale galas.

title: Rivet Urban Distressed Leather Biker Jacket
description: Rivet's biker jacket showcases genuine distressed leather with asymmetrical zip and zippered pockets for a rugged look. The quilted lining offers extra warmth without compromising style. Ideal for night rides or edgy streetwear ensembles.

title: Serenity Organic Cotton Crewneck Sweatshirt
description: This cozy crewneck from Serenity is made from 100% organic cotton, offering a soft, breathable feel for everyday comfort. The relaxed fit and minimalistic logo make it a versatile layering piece for both lounging and casual outings. Eco‑friendly dyes ensure lasting color without harsh chemicals.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash warm, tumble dry low

title: Mira Luxe Satin Slip Dress
description: Mira Luxe presents a sleek satin slip dress that drapes elegantly over the body, delivering a sophisticated silhouette. The adjustable spaghetti straps and hidden side zipper provide a customizable fit. Its deep emerald hue makes it perfect for cocktail parties or date nights.

title: Harborline Classic Oxford Shirt
description: Harborline's Oxford shirt offers timeless style with its crisp button‑down front and subtle chest pocket. Made from durable cotton twill, it maintains a polished look throughout the day. Available in classic white and soft blue, it pairs well with both jeans and dress pants.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash warm, tumble dry medium

title: Celeste Knit Midi Skirt
description: The Celeste midi skirt features a fine ribbed knit that offers stretch and comfort while maintaining a sleek profile. Its A‑line cut and high waist create a flattering silhouette for any body type. Choose from muted taupe or soft blush for versatile styling.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, lay flat to dry

title: TrekPro Performance Trail Running Shorts
description: TrekPro's trail running shorts combine lightweight polyester with moisture‑wicking technology to keep you dry on rugged paths. The built‑in brief and zippered pockets provide security and convenience. Reflective accents enhance visibility during low‑light runs.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

title: Vivid Threads Graphic Tee
description: Vivid Threads offers a soft cotton tee featuring an eye‑catching abstract graphic on the front. The relaxed fit and tagless neckline ensure all‑day comfort. Ideal for street style looks or casual weekend wear.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

title: Alpine Ridge Wool Blend Peacoat
description: The Alpine Ridge peacoat combines a warm wool blend with a classic double‑breasted design for timeless winter style. Its structured silhouette and sleek navy color make it suitable for both business and casual settings. Functional side pockets and a removable faux‑fur collar add practicality and flair.

title: PulseFit Seamless Sports Bra
description: PulseFit's seamless sports bra offers medium support with a smooth, chafe‑free construction ideal for yoga and low‑impact workouts. The breathable mesh panels provide ventilation, while the adjustable straps ensure a customized fit. Available in muted mauve and charcoal.

title: Cobalt Denim High‑Rise Skinny Jeans
description: These high‑rise skinny jeans from Cobalt Denim feature a stretch denim fabric that hugs the hips and thighs while allowing freedom of movement. The classic five‑pocket styling and subtle fading give them a modern, lived‑in look. Perfect for dressing up with heels or down with sneakers.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

title: Eclipse Minimalist Leather Wallet
description: Eclipse's minimalist wallet is crafted from full‑grain leather with a sleek, bifold design that holds cards, cash, and IDs efficiently. The RFID‑blocking lining protects against electronic theft. Its slim profile fits comfortably in any pocket.

attributes.care_instructions: Wipe with a dry cloth, avoid water
